cases.name: phases-in-order
cases.prompt: Run the full feature workflow: Add user dashboard with project list.
expected_behavior: Runs prep first and pauses at the Development Context summary for confirmation
Runs plan with the feature description and creates the ticket before any implementation
Runs produce, then present, and summarizes the results at the end

cases.name: question-shaped-input-investigates
cases.prompt: ks-feature: what would it take to add SSO to the admin area?
expected_behavior: Engages the plan skill's Investigation Mode: research and report only
Creates no ticket and writes no code until the developer says build
